title: Twirl and Swirl: World Pasta Day!
story: Every fork around the world gets ready to twirl on October 25 for World Pasta Day! This delicious holiday celebrates all things pasta, from spaghetti and macaroni to ravioli and lasagna. Restaurants create special pasta menus, cooking classes teach people how to make fresh noodles from scratch, and families gather to share their favorite pasta recipes. Food lovers post pictures of their most creative pasta dishes on social media, showing off colorful shapes and amazing sauces. Some people even try making pasta art or learning about different pasta traditions from Italy and other countries. It's a day when everyone can agree that life is better with a little more pasta on your plate!
activity_question: What do people often post on social media during World Pasta Day?
activity_choices: Photos of their pets eating spaghetti
bonus_fact: There are over 300 different pasta shapes made around the world!
